en.search.placeholder: Search files, apps, commands, and the web…
en.search.hint: ↑↓ navigate   ↵ open   Ctrl+↵ folder   Esc close
en.tray.runningBody: Double-tap Ctrl (or press Alt+Space) to search.
en.update.balloonBody: Version {0} is available (you have {1}). Click to download.
en.update.failed: Couldn't check for updates. Try again later.
en.update.promptBody:
A new version {0} is available.
You have {1}.

Open the download page now?
en.settings.title: M2_APEX Settings
en.settings.doubleCtrl: Show search bar on double-tap Ctrl
en.settings.quickSwitch: Quick Switch: type in File Explorer to jump to a file
en.settings.foreignInput: Ignore keys sent from another PC (Synergy / KVM / remote)
en.settings.filesFirst: Prioritise files and folders over apps
en.settings.priority: Location priority — one per line, top = highest (e.g. Desktop, C:\, D:\):
en.settings.drives: Indexed drives (one per line, blank = all fixed drives):

zh-TW.search.placeholder: 搜尋檔案、應用程式、指令與網頁…
zh-TW.search.hint: ↑↓ 移動   ↵ 開啟   Ctrl+↵ 資料夾   Esc 關閉
zh-TW.index.loaded: 已從快取載入 {0} 筆索引
zh-TW.tray.tooltip: M2_APEX — 雙擊 Ctrl 開始搜尋
zh-TW.tray.runningBody: 雙擊 Ctrl(或按 Alt+Space)開始搜尋。
zh-TW.update.balloonBody: 有新版本 {0}(目前為 {1})。點擊下載。
zh-TW.update.failed: 無法檢查更新,請稍後再試。
zh-TW.update.promptBody:
有新版本 {0}。
目前版本為 {1}。

是否立即開啟下載頁面?
zh-TW.settings.title: M2_APEX 設定
zh-TW.settings.doubleCtrl: 雙擊 Ctrl 開啟搜尋列
zh-TW.settings.altSpace: 以 Alt+Space 開啟搜尋列
zh-TW.settings.quickSwitch: Quick Switch:在檔案總管打字即可跳到檔案
zh-TW.settings.foreignInput: 忽略來自其他電腦的按鍵(Synergy / KVM / 遠端)
zh-TW.settings.doubleCtrlGap: 雙擊 Ctrl 最大間隔(毫秒):
zh-TW.settings.filesFirst: 檔案與資料夾優先於應用程式
zh-TW.settings.webUrl: 網頁搜尋 URL({0} = 關鍵字):
zh-TW.settings.priority: 位置優先順序 — 每行一個,越上面越優先(例如 Desktop、C:\、D:\):
zh-TW.settings.drives: 索引磁碟(每行一個,留空 = 所有固定磁碟):
zh-TW.settings.excluded: 排除的資料夾名稱(每行一個):
